title: Does anyone here know of any upcoming penny stocks with major catalysts or anything like that going into effect recently?
author: Serious_Truck283
selftext: I observe the AI booming and still hold some penny ones like $OPEN and $WTF (and yeh both of us are kinda surging somedays) but i need others as  Acquisitions, Mergers, Partnerships, FDA approvals, even Business meetings under many circumstances can prove to be potential catalysts. Stocks with catalysts going into positive effect and belong to fintech or anything majors, just working is passed out!

comments.author: hazzmun
comments.body: Nicu Magna mining is looking promising today
